title: Algorithms
summary: 9618 AS — algorithm design, flowcharts, pseudocode, searching, sorting, and trace tables.
learningObjectives: Express algorithms using pseudocode and flowcharts.
Compare bubble, insertion, and merge sort.

simpleExplanation.title: Step-by-step procedures
simpleExplanation.summary: Algorithms are finite, unambiguous steps to solve a problem. Efficiency is measured in comparisons and swaps for sorting/searching.
steps: Linear search: check each item — O(n).
Binary search: sorted list, halve range — O(log n).
Bubble sort: adjacent swaps — O(n²) worst case.
Merge sort: divide and merge — O(n log n).

sections.content: **Algorithms** (9.2) dominate Paper 2 trace questions. Practise **dry-running** loops and **writing pseudocode** with clear indentation.
Binary search requires a **sorted** list — state this before tracing. Off-by-one errors in **mid** calculation lose marks.
